events.title: End of the Naming Wars
events.summary: The Eight Cities ratify the Naming Accord at Candlekeep.

events.title: Founding of the Academy at Velmis
events.summary: Sister institution to Candlekeep, focused on instruction rather than archive.

events.title: Morgana's Exile
events.summary: Morgana un-names a long-dead king during her thesis defence and is cast out of Velmis.

events.title: The Cracked Sarcophagus
events.summary: Three nights before play begins: Avowed repairing the cloister wall unearth a sealed sarcophagus that splits open of its own accord.
